title: Senior Frontend Developer at Dunzo Capital India

jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Dunzo Capital India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Dunzo Capital India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Amritsar-based team.

About Dunzo Capital India:
Dunzo Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dunzo Capital India!
